scenario.title: The Full Feature Generator
scenario.context: You need AI to generate a complete feature across multiple files: backend API, database, frontend components, tests, and documentation - all working together.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that orchestrates AI to generate a complete cross-cutting feature with proper integration between all layers.
constraints: Generate all layers (DB, API, UI, tests)
Generate both happy path and error handling
scenario.exampleInput: Build complete 'Team Invitations' feature: invite by email, accept/decline, role assignment, expiration. Needs: DB schema, API endpoints, React components, email templates, tests, and API documentation.

rubric.name: Data Model
rubric.description: Is the data model clearly defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: Complete schema with relationships and constraints

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Guide AI to generate complete Team Invitations feature:

FEATURE: Team Invitations

---

DATA MODEL:

```sql
-- Database schema (Drizzle/PostgreSQL)

CREATE TYPE invitation_status AS ENUM ('pending', 'accepted', 'declined', 'expired');
CREATE TYPE team_role AS ENUM ('owner', 'admin', 'member', 'viewer');

CREATE TABLE team_invitations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  team_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  
  -- Invitee info
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role team_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  
  -- Invitation metadata
  token VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL,  -- Secure random token for accept link
  status invitation_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  message TEXT,  -- Optional personal message
  
  -- Tracking
  invited_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,  -- Default: 7 days from creation
  
  -- Lifecycle
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  responded_at TIMESTAMP,  -- When accepted/declined
  
  -- Constraints
  CONSTRAINT unique_pending_invitation UNIQUE (team_id, email, status)
    WHERE status = 'pending'
);

CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_email ON team_invitations(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_token ON team_invitations(token);
CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_expires ON team_invitations(expires_at) 
  WHERE status = 'pending';
```

```typescript
// Drizzle schema equivalent (lib/db/schema.ts)
export const teamInvitations = pgTable('team_invitations', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  teamId: uuid('team_id').notNull().references(() => teams.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  email: varchar('email', { length: 255 }).notNull(),
  role: teamRoleEnum('role').notNull().default('member'),
  token: varchar('token', { length: 64 }).unique().notNull(),
  status: invitationStatusEnum('status').notNull().default('pending'),
  message: text('message'),
  invitedBy: uuid('invited_by').notNull().references(() => users.id),
  expiresAt: timestamp('expires_at').notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  respondedAt: timestamp('responded_at'),
});
```

---

API CONTRACTS:

```yaml
endpoints:

  # Create invitation
  POST /api/teams/:teamId/invitations:
    auth: required (must be team admin+)
    body:
      email: string (valid email, required)
      role: 'admin' | 'member' | 'viewer' (default: 'member')
      message: string (optional, max 500 chars)
    response:
      201:
        invitation: InvitationType
      400:
        error: 'INVALID_EMAIL' | 'USER_ALREADY_MEMBER' | 'INVITATION_EXISTS'
      403:
        error: 'INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS'
    side_effects:
      - Send invitation email
      - Create activity log entry

  # List team invitations
  GET /api/teams/:teamId/invitations:
    auth: required (team member+)
    query:
      status: 'pending' | 'accepted' | 'declined' | 'expired' | 'all'
    response:
      200:
        invitations: InvitationType[]
        total: number

  # Resend invitation
  POST /api/teams/:teamId/invitations/:id/resend:
    auth: required (must be team admin+)
    response:
      200:
        invitation: InvitationType (with new expires_at)
      400:
        error: 'INVITATION_NOT_PENDING'
    side_effects:
      - Extend expiration by 7 days
      - Resend email

  # Revoke invitation
  DELETE /api/teams/:teamId/invitations/:id:
    auth: required (must be team admin+ OR original inviter)
    response:
      204: (no content)
      404:
        error: 'INVITATION_NOT_FOUND'

  # Accept invitation (public route with token)
  POST /api/invitations/accept:
    auth: optional (will create account or link to existing)
    body:
      token: string (required)
    response:
      200:
        team: TeamType
        role: string
      400:
        error: 'INVALID_TOKEN' | 'INVITATION_EXPIRED' | 'INVITATION_ALREADY_RESPONDED'
    side_effects:
      - Add user to team
      - Update invitation status
      - Send confirmation to inviter
      - Create account if needed

  # Decline invitation (public route with token)
  POST /api/invitations/decline:
    body:
      token: string
    response:
      200:
        message: 'Invitation declined'
    side_effects:
      - Update invitation status
      - Notify inviter (optional)

  # Get pending invitations for current user (by email)
  GET /api/user/invitations:
    auth: required
    response:
      200:
        invitations: InvitationType[] (with team info)
```

---

TYPE DEFINITIONS:

```typescript
// types/invitations.ts

export interface Invitation {
  id: string;
  teamId: string;
  email: string;
  role: 'admin' | 'member' | 'viewer';
  status: 'pending' | 'accepted' | 'declined' | 'expired';
  message: string | null;
  invitedBy: string;
  inviterName: string;  // Joined from users
  expiresAt: Date;
  createdAt: Date;
  respondedAt: Date | null;
  team?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    avatar: string | null;
  };
}

export interface CreateInvitationInput {
  email: string;
  role?: 'admin' | 'member' | 'viewer';
  message?: string;
}

export interface InvitationResponse {
  token: string;
}
```

---

USER FLOWS:

```yaml
flow_1_invite_member:
  steps:
    1. Admin opens team settings
    2. Clicks "Invite Member"
    3. Enters email, selects role, optional message
    4. Clicks "Send Invitation"
    5. System validates email not already member
    6. System creates invitation with secure token
    7. System sends email with accept link
    8. UI shows success message and new pending invitation
  
  edge_cases:
    - Email already team member → Show error
    - Pending invitation exists → Ask to resend
    - Invalid email format → Inline validation
    - Rate limit (10 invites/hour) → Show limit message

flow_2_accept_invitation:
  steps:
    1. Recipient gets email
    2. Clicks "Accept Invitation" link
    3. If logged in as different email → Warning + option to switch
    4. If not logged in → Sign in/up flow (email pre-filled)
    5. System validates token not expired
    6. System adds user to team with role
    7. Redirect to team dashboard
    8. Show welcome message
  
  edge_cases:
    - Token expired → Show expiry message + contact admin
    - Token invalid → Show error
    - Already accepted → Redirect to team (idempotent)
    - User has conflicting account → Merge guidance

flow_3_manage_invitations:
  steps:
    1. Admin views pending invitations list
    2. Can resend (extend expiry + new email)
    3. Can revoke (soft delete)
    4. Can see who invited whom and when
  
  edge_cases:
    - Resend limit (3 per invitation) → Show message
    - Invitation accepted between load and action → Refresh state
```

---

FILES TO GENERATE:

```yaml
backend:
  - lib/db/schema.ts (add invitation tables)
  - lib/validations/invitations.ts (Zod schemas)
  - server/routers/invitations.ts (tRPC router)
  - lib/email/templates/invitation.tsx (React Email template)
  - lib/services/invitations.ts (business logic)

frontend:
  - components/team/InviteMemberModal.tsx
  - components/team/InvitationsList.tsx
  - components/team/PendingInvitationBanner.tsx
  - app/invitations/[token]/page.tsx (accept/decline page)
  - hooks/useInvitations.ts

tests:
  - tests/api/invitations.test.ts (API integration)
  - tests/services/invitations.test.ts (unit)
  - tests/components/InviteMemberModal.test.tsx (component)

migrations:
  - drizzle/migrations/XXXX_add_invitations.sql

docs:
  - docs/api/invitations.md (API reference)
```

---

INTEGRATION REQUIREMENTS:

```yaml
shared_types:
  - Export types from types/invitations.ts
  - Import in both frontend and backend
  - Use same Zod schemas for validation (client + server)

email_integration:
  - Use existing email service (lib/email/send.ts)
  - Template must include: team name, inviter name, role, message, accept/decline buttons
  - Accept URL format: {{APP_URL}}/invitations/{{token}}

auth_integration:
  - Accept endpoint handles: logged in, logged out, wrong account
  - New user sign-up preserves invitation context

activity_log:
  - Log: invitation_sent, invitation_accepted, invitation_declined, invitation_revoked
```
